title: Here’s what happened in crypto today

title: US, UK treasuries to align transatlantic rules on tokenization and stablecoins

title: The Bitcoin Softfork That Tried to Police “Junk Data” — And Why It’s Already Failing
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

The Bitcoin Softfork That Tried to Police “Junk Data” — And Why It’s Already Failing
Bitcoin’s real power is that anyone willing to pay fees can write to the ledger. BIP-110’s backers want to change that for data-heavy transactions. The backlash reveals what’s truly at stake.

title: ‘They are relentless’: A scammer is trying to change the email on my empty Robinhood account. What do they have to gain?
My husband and I are retired. Our financial adviser, who is in his 30s, called us ‘you guyses.’ Is that unprofessional?
summary: “I’m wondering whether I should ask to work with someone closer to our generation.”
